title: Limited timed event big benefits
author: hexernexer_
selftext:
DCPTG recently got there token added to the official list of approved crypto tokens. To celebrate they have this limited time event
That is ending in 45 hours (April 26th)

(Need an invite link to make an account)
Sign up link: 

https://app.dcpgtv.com/?tid=9YMEGX

The whole point of DCPTG is too use A.I to get small but consistent gains trading crypto with just a click of a button. you can pretty much double your money in a month.

CURRENT EVENT

1️⃣. For a single deposit of 123~123.99USDT, you will receive a reward of 123USDT!

2️⃣. For a single deposit of 223~223.99USDT, you will receive a reward of 223USDT!

3️⃣. For a single deposit of 623~623.99USDT, you will receive a reward of 623USDT!

4️⃣. For a single deposit of 1323~1323.99USDT, you will receive a reward of 1323USDT!

5️⃣. For a single deposit of 3323~3323.99USDT, you will receive a reward of 3323USDT!

comments.author: syntacticfalls79
comments.body: This sounds like a great opportunity to take advantage of some big benefits with DCPTG's limited time event! Using A.I. for consistent gains in crypto trading is definitely intriguing. Have any of you already signed up and seen success? Let's share our experiences and insights! #DCPTG #cryptoevent #AItrading
